title: Union Pacific May Have a Catch-22 On Its Hands
text: Significant staffing reductions between 2017 and 2020 may cause more problems than the added profitability was worth. Union Pacific is hiring again, which could pose a threat to its profit margin.

title: 3 railroads team up to better compete with CPKC to serve Mexico
text: OMAHA, Neb. — Three major freight railroads responded Monday to the Canadian Pacific-Kansas City Southern merger with an agreement to work together on a competing service to carry shipments across North America.

title: Union Pacific Recognizes Companies for Safe Chemical Transportation
text: Ninety-five companies honored with 2022 Pinnacle Award OMAHA, Neb. , April 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad today announced that 95 companies won the 2022 Pinnacle Award for their dedication and commitment to safely transporting chemicals by rail.

title: Service improvement in the spotlight as CSX and Union Pacific kick off rail earnings
text: Railroad earnings reporting season kicked off this week with CSX Corp. and Union Pacific Corp. both beating Wall Street's top and bottom line estimates Thursday.

title: Union Pacific's Beth Whited Honored as Champion of Sustainability Strategies
text: Whited among top executives named to Constellation Research ESG50 List for 2023 OMAHA, Neb. , April 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific's Beth Whited, executive vice president – Sustainability and Strategy, and Chief Human Resource Officer, today was named to the esteemed Constellation ESG50 for 2023.

title: Union Pacific's outlook for 2023 doesn't include a recession
text: Union Pacific sees numerous macroeconomic headwinds in 2023. A recession is not among them, officials said during the railroad's first-quarter 2023 earnings call.

title: Why Union Pacific Stock Is Up Today
text: Union Pacific beat analysts' estimates for earnings per share and revenue despite a decline in volumes. The company is also feeling the impact of inflation.

title: Union Pacific (UNP) Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Union Pacific (UNP) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.67 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.57 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.57 per share a year ago.

title: Union Pacific Earnings Show the U.S. Economy Is Slowing. The Railroad Stock Is Up.
text: Union Pacific reported earnings per share of $2.67 from sales of $6 billion on Thursday. That's a little better than the $2.57 per share from $6 billion in sales that Wall Street was looking for.

title: Union Pacific stock rises after Q1 top and bottom line beat
text: Union Pacific Corp.'s UNP, +1.27% stock rose 1.4% before market open Thursday after the railroad reported first-quarter profit and revenue that beat Wall Street's expectations. Net income was $1.06 billion, or $2.67 a share, compared with $1.6 billion, or $2.57 a share, in the prior year's quarter.

title: Union Pacific Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: Earnings per diluted share of $2.67 Operating revenue up 3% Reportable Derailment Rate Improved 10%       OMAHA, Neb. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) today reported 2023 first quarter net income of $1.6 billion, or $2.67 per diluted share.

title: Union Pacific: Time To Pay Attention
text: Union Pacific is a company that is rarely, if ever really "cheap" or "undervalued". The last time it could be argued that the company was trading cheap was in 2020. Back then, it briefly touched below a 15x P/E, before going on to deliver impressive returns for years. It's not below 15x P/E now, but it's getting cheaper.

title: 7 Industrial Stocks to Buy for April 2023
text: Industrial stocks are not flashy or cutting edge. They are often railroads, construction companies, or firms that make heating and ventilation equipment.

title: Embrace The Drop: Union Pacific Is A Buy
text: Last month, I aggressively added to my Union Pacific position, as shares are trading roughly 30% below their all-time high. In this article, I explain why the stock is down, and how I assess the risk/reward in light of economic developments.

title: Union Pacific: A Great Company That Should Be On Your Watchlist
text: Shares of Union Pacific are down more than 22% from their all-time high. Union Pacific is trading for a fair valuation and enjoys an almost monopolistic positioning.
